Interface StatementContainer

All Superinterfaces:
EqualsModProperty<SourceElement>, ModelElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, SyntaxElement
All Known Subinterfaces:
Branch, ParameterContainer, ProgramConstruct
All Known Implementing Classes:
ArrayLength, ArrayPostDecl, BranchImp, Case, Catch, CatchAllStatement, Ccatch, CcatchReturnValParameterDeclaration, ClassInitializer, ConstructorCall, ConstructorDeclaration, ContextStatementBlock, CreateObject, Default, Do, DoBreak, Else, EnhancedFor, EnhancedForElimination, EvaluateArgs, Exec, ExpandMethodBody, Finally, For, ForInitUnfoldTransformer, ForToWhile, InitArray, InitArrayCreation, IsStatic, LabeledStatement, LoopInit, LoopScopeBlock, LoopStatement, MethodCall, MethodDeclaration, MethodFrame, MultipleVarDecl, PostWork, ProgramSV, ProgramTransformer, ReattachLoopInvariant, SpecialConstructorCall, StatementBlock, StaticInitialisation, SwitchToIf, SynchronizedBlock, Then, Try, TypeOf, Unpack, UnwindLoop, While
public interface StatementContainer extends NonTerminalProgramElement
Statement container. taken from COMPOST and changed to achieve an immutable structure
